name: Errors And Recovery
purpose: Define user-facing behavior for failures and edge cases.

errorTypes.recovery: Retry the last safe request and preserve prompt or Work Plan state.

errorTypes.message: This frontend origin is not allowed by the backend.
errorTypes.recovery: Set FRONTEND_ORIGIN and FRONTEND_ORIGINS on Render to the Vercel domain.

errorTypes.message: A valid demo token is required.
errorTypes.recovery: Send X-Demo-Token when DEMO_API_TOKEN is enabled.
Return to the relevant form and correct the invalid field.

errorTypes.message: Prompt must be 8000 characters or fewer.
errorTypes.recovery: Ask user to shorten prompt or move extra material into future source upload flow.

errorTypes.message: Only Work Mode analysis is supported by the backend.
The analysis record no longer exists.
errorTypes.recovery: Re-submit the prompt because memory store data may have reset.

errorTypes.message: The Work Plan record no longer exists.
errorTypes.recovery: Create a new Work Plan because memory store data may have reset.

errorTypes.message: A selected workflow, module, or skill is not valid for the current registry.
errorTypes.recovery: Rebuild suggestions from GET /skills and POST /analyze.

errorTypes.message: This Work Plan changed before the latest save or approval.
errorTypes.recovery: Fetch latest WorkPlanRecord and ask user to reapply local changes.

errorTypes.message: The Work Plan is not ready.
errorTypes.recovery: Show validation errors and keep the editor open.

errorTypes.message: Only draft Work Plans can be approved.
errorTypes.recovery: Return to editor and reset approval through an edit if needed.

errorTypes.message: Approve the Work Plan before generating.
errorTypes.recovery: Navigate to Work Plan editor and show approval bar.

errorTypes.message: Too many requests. Wait and retry.

errorTypes.recovery: Return to approved state and keep the approved Work Plan.
Backend uses deterministic/template fallback when configured.

clickActions.note: Route exists; current React client needs a recovery UI to call it.

displayRules.behavior: Show requestId and readable error message; log details in backend.
Display requestId in expandable details for debugging.
Do not clear prompt or Work Plan draft when recoverable errors occur.
Do not display OPENAI_API_KEY or partial secrets in any error panel.
